ogTitle: Lockhart River vs Lockrose: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lockhart River and Lockrose.
heading: Lockhart River vs Lockrose — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lockhart River, Queensland and Lockrose, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lockhart River has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Lockrose (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lockhart River or Lockrose safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lockhart River has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Lockrose scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lockhart River scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Lockrose scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lockhart River or Lockrose?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lockhart River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
